list.name: event_type
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS event_type UNION SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM events ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Critical events
panels.description: Critical events in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::int AS value FROM events WHERE severity='CRITICAL' AND $__timeFilter(time)

panels.title: Warnings
panels.description: Warning events in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::int AS value FROM events WHERE severity='WARNING' AND $__timeFilter(time)

panels.title: Affected devices
panels.description: Distinct devices with events in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT device_id)::int AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

panels.title: Unacknowledged events
panels.description: Events that have not been acknowledged by an operator.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::int AS value FROM events WHERE acknowledged = false AND $__timeFilter(time)

panels.title: Most common event
panels.description: Most frequently detected event type in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce((SELECT event_type FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1), 'none') AS value

panels.title: Latest event age
panels.description: Minutes since the newest event in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(round((extract(epoch from (now() - max(time))) / 60.0)::numeric, 2), 0) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

panels.title: Recent events with rule context
panels.description: Newest events. Use the filters above to focus by severity or event type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, device_id, event_type, severity, rule_name, round(event_value::numeric, 2) AS event_value, round(threshold_value::numeric, 2) AS threshold_value, acknowledged, message FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('$severity' = 'ALL' OR severity = '$severity') AND ('$event_type' = 'ALL' OR event_type = '$event_type') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Events by type per minute
panels.description: Real one-minute event buckets grouped by event type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, '1m') AS time, event_type AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Events by severity per minute
panels.description: Real one-minute event buckets grouped by severity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, '1m') AS time, severity AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top affected devices
panels.description: Devices with the most events in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_id, count(*)::int AS events, count(*) FILTER (WHERE severity='CRITICAL')::int AS critical, count(*) FILTER (WHERE severity='WARNING')::int AS warning, max(time) AS latest_event FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY device_id ORDER BY events DESC, latest_event DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Event type summary
panels.description: Event counts by type and severity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type, severity, count(*)::int AS events, count(DISTINCT device_id)::int AS affected_devices, max(time) AS latest_event FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY event_type, severity ORDER BY events DESC, event_type
